question: Give me your one clear opinion on the single most important thing in your field, no hedging.
Walk me through how YOU specifically evaluate a new idea in your field, in your own framework.
Quote, word for word with an exact date, something you once said about a niche topic.
Your usual rule is wrong here is a strong counterexample with real numbers. Convince me or update.
What is your actual, documented position on your core topic, and where does it come from?
